# Positive control for the supply-chain 'typosquat / hallucinated package name' sub-rule.
# This is a Python pip requirements file. Most entries are legitimate, but two names are
# deliberate typosquats of popular packages — a heuristic catch (no registry lookup):
#   reqeusts  -> typosquat of `requests`
#   python-dateutl -> typosquat of `python-dateutil`
# Installing either pulls whatever an attacker has parked under that near-miss name.
flask==3.0.0
requests==2.31.0
reqeusts==2.31.0
numpy==1.26.4
python-dateutl==2.8.2
sqlalchemy==2.0.25
